blended.narrative: Mt. Seymour is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 14 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,608 ft. Looking ahead, 29 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Saturday: light rain showers, highs of 42°F.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
